title: How long does the review process take to publish an app?
excerpt: Hello, we submitted an application for publishing to the monday.com marketplace. we would like to know how long can we expect the review process to reasonably take? is there any info on that? thanks.

posts.author: morpheus (morpheus)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, we submitted an application for publishing to the monday.com marketplace. we would like to know how long can we expect the review process to reasonably take? is there any info on that? thanks.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @morpheus,

Congrats!

You can expect an initial response within 72 business hours. After that, it really depends on the app type, size, features, and your progress on the review board you will be invited to.

Best,
Rachel
